info.title: Slack
info.description: One way to interact with the Slack platform is its HTTP RPC-based Web API, a collection of methods requiring OAuth 2.0-based user, bot, or workspace tokens blessed with related OAuth scopes.

post.description: Deletes a message.

parameters.name: as_user
parameters.description: Pass true to delete the message as the authed user with `chat:write:user` scope. [Bot users](/bot-users) in this context are considered authed users. If unused or false, the message will be deleted with `chat:write:bot` scope.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `chat:write`

parameters.name: ts
parameters.description: Timestamp of the message to be deleted.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel containing the message to be deleted.

post.description: Edit an existing file comment.

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Text of the comment to edit.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `chat:write`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The comment to edit.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: File containing the comment to edit.

post.description: Close a direct message channel.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `chat:write`

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel containing the message to be deleted.

get.description: Retrieve a thread of messages posted to a private channel

parameters.name: thread_ts
parameters.description: Unique identifier of a thread's parent message

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `groups:history`

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Private channel to fetch thread from

get.description: Gets information about a bot user.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `groups:history`

parameters.name: bot
parameters.description: Bot user to get info on

post.description: Renames a private channel.

parameters.name: validate
parameters.description: Whether to return errors on invalid channel name instead of modifying it to meet the specified criteria.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `chat:write`

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: New name for private channel.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel containing the message to be deleted.

post.description: Set the profile information for a user.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Collection of key:value pairs presented as a URL-encoded JSON hash.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `chat:write`

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: ID of user to change. This argument may only be specified by team admins on paid teams.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to set a single key to. Usable only if `profile` is not passed.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: New name for private channel.

post.description: Manually sets user presence.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `chat:write`

parameters.name: presence
parameters.description: Either `auto` or `away`

post.description: Closes a direct message or multi-person direct message.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel containing the message to be deleted.

post.description: Opens a direct message channel.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `chat:write`

parameters.name: return_im
parameters.description: Boolean, indicates you want the full IM channel definition in the response.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: ID of user to change. This argument may only be specified by team admins on paid teams.

parameters.name: include_locale
parameters.description: Set this to `true` to receive the locale for this im. Defaults to `false`

get.description: Lists private channels that the calling user has access to.

parameters.name: exclude_members
parameters.description: Exclude the `members` from each `group`

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `groups:history`

parameters.name: exclude_archived
parameters.description: Don't return archived private channels.

get.description: Gets the integration logs for the current team.

parameters.name: change_type
parameters.description: Filter logs with this change type. Defaults to all logs.

parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: Filter logs to this Slack app. Defaults to all logs.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `groups:history`

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Filter logs generated by this user???s actions. Defaults to all logs.

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Filter logs to this service. Defaults to all logs.

get.description: Exchanges a temporary OAuth verifier code for a workspace token.

parameters.name: client_secret
parameters.description: Issued when you created your application.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The `code` param returned via the OAuth callback.

parameters.name: single_channel
parameters.description: Request the user to add your app only to a single channel.

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: Issued when you created your application.

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: This must match the originally submitted URI (if one was sent).

post.description: Uploads or creates a file.

parameters.name: channels
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of channel names or IDs where the file will be shared.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Title of file.

parameters.name: initial_comment
parameters.description: Initial comment to add to file.

parameters.name: filetype
parameters.description: A [file type](/types/file#file_types) identifier.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Filename of file.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: File contents via a POST variable. If omitting this parameter, you must provide a `file`.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `files:write:user`

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: File containing the comment to edit.

parameters.description: Allow results that involve disabled User Groups.

parameters.name: usergroup
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the User Group to update.

parameters.description: Filter logs generated by this user???s actions. Defaults to all logs.

get.description: Searches for messages and files matching a query.

parameters.name: sort_dir
parameters.description: Change sort direction to ascending (`asc`) or descending (`desc`).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query. May contains booleans, etc.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Return matches sorted by either `score` or `timestamp`.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `groups:history`

parameters.name: highlight
parameters.description: Pass a value of `true` to enable query highlight markers (see below).

post.description: Provide custom unfurl behavior for user-posted URLs

parameters.name: user_auth_message
parameters.description: Provide a simply-formatted string to send as an ephemeral message to the user as invitation to authenticate further and enable full unfurling behavior

parameters.name: user_auth_required
parameters.description: Set to `true` or `1` to indicate the user must install your Slack app to trigger unfurls for this domain

parameters.name: unfurls
parameters.description: URL-encoded JSON map with keys set to URLs featured in the the message, pointing to their unfurl message attachments.

parameters.name: ts
parameters.description: Timestamp of the message to be deleted.

parameters.name: user_auth_url
parameters.description: Send users to this custom URL where they will complete authentication in your app to fully trigger unfurling. Value should be properly URL-encoded.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `chat:write`

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel containing the message to be deleted.

get.description: Lists all channels in a Slack team.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Paginate through collections of data by setting the `cursor` parameter to a `next_cursor` attribute returned by a previous request's `response_metadata`. Default value fetches the first "page" of the collection. See [pagination](/docs/pagination) for more detail.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `groups:history`

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return. Fewer than the requested number of items may be returned, even if the end of the list hasn't been reached. Must be an integer no larger than 1000.

parameters.name: exclude_archived
parameters.description: Don't return archived private channels.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Mix and match channel types by providing a comma-separated list of any combination of `public_channel`, `private_channel`, `mpim`, `im`

post.description: Sends an ephemeral message to a user in a channel.

parameters.name: attachments
parameters.description: A JSON-based array of structured attachments, presented as a URL-encoded string.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text of the message to send. See below for an explanation of [formatting](#formatting). This field is usually required, unless you're providing only `attachments` instead.

parameters.name: link_names
parameters.description: Find and link channel names and usernames.

parameters.name: parse
parameters.description: Change how messages are treated. Defaults to `none`. See [below](#formatting).

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `chat:write`

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: ID of user to change. This argument may only be specified by team admins on paid teams.

parameters.name: as_user
parameters.description: Pass true to delete the message as the authed user with `chat:write:user` scope. [Bot users](/bot-users) in this context are considered authed users. If unused or false, the message will be deleted with `chat:write:bot` scope.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel containing the message to be deleted.

parameters.name: name

parameters.name: users
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of user ids, up to 400 per request

post.description: Updates a message.

parameters.name: attachments

parameters.name: text

get.description: Retrieve a thread of messages posted to a channel

parameters.name: thread_ts
parameters.description: Unique identifier of a thread's parent message

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `groups:history`

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Private channel to fetch thread from

post.description: Sends a message to a channel.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Set your bot's user name. Must be used in conjunction with `as_user` set to false, otherwise ignored. See [authorship](#authorship) below.

parameters.name: thread_ts
parameters.description: Provide another message's `ts` value to make this message a reply. Avoid using a reply's `ts` value; use its parent instead.

parameters.name: attachments
parameters.description: A JSON-based array of structured attachments, presented as a URL-encoded string.

parameters.name: unfurl_links
parameters.description: Pass true to enable unfurling of primarily text-based content.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text of the message to send. See below for an explanation of [formatting](#formatting). This field is usually required, unless you're providing only `attachments` instead.

parameters.name: unfurl_media
parameters.description: Pass false to disable unfurling of media content.

parameters.name: parse
parameters.description: Change how messages are treated. Defaults to `none`. See [below](#formatting).

parameters.name: as_user
parameters.description: Pass true to delete the message as the authed user with `chat:write:user` scope. [Bot users](/bot-users) in this context are considered authed users. If unused or false, the message will be deleted with `chat:write:bot` scope.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `chat:write`

parameters.name: icon_emoji
parameters.description: Emoji to use as the icon for this message. Overrides `icon_url`. Must be used in conjunction with `as_user` set to `false`, otherwise ignored. See [authorship](#authorship) below.

parameters.name: link_names
parameters.description: Find and link channel names and usernames.

parameters.name: icon_url
parameters.description: URL to an image to use as the icon for this message. Must be used in conjunction with `as_user` set to false, otherwise ignored. See [authorship](#authorship) below.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel containing the message to be deleted.

parameters.name: reply_broadcast
parameters.description: Used in conjunction with `thread_ts` and indicates whether reply should be made visible to everyone in the channel or conversation. Defaults to `false`.

post.description: Marks a user as active.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Authentication token. Requires scope: `chat:write`
